title: For Them That Trespass
writer: Ernest Raymond, J. Lee Thompson, William Douglas-Home
actors: Stephen Murray, Richard Todd, Patricia Plunkett
plot: Christy Drew, an aspiring young writer trying to broaden his experience, gets involved with Frankie Ketchen and her two suitors, Herb Logan and Jim Heal. One night, Jim finds Frankie has been with Christy and kills her. Herb is ac...
